title: Partners Again
writer: Montague Glass, Jules Eckert Goodman, Frances Marion
actors: George Sidney, Alexander Carr, Betty Jewel
plot: Potash and Perlmutter, dealers for the "Schenckman 6" auto, are swindled into buying a phony invention and organizing other investors. Potash is so rattled by thoughts of jail he becomes delusional while on the lam, he starts wing...
